title: melandrium dioicum subsp. rubrum
intro: Melandrium dioicum subsp. rubrum, also known as the red-pink form of the Melandrium dioicum, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it useful in traditional medicine for treating various health issues. The health benefits of Melandrium dioicum subsp. rubrum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The plant is commonly prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in tinctures and salves, to harness its medicinal properties.
